commonRules: Preserve only the product, brand, audience, platform, and tone cues that are explicitly present in the source brief.
Treat missing details as open constraints instead of inventing brand facts or user needs.
Use inspiration references to extract transferable design logic rather than copying a single layout, visual treatment, or narrative beat literally.
Treat shader, WebGL, Spline-style, and 3D motion ideas as advisory design cues only, not as runtime support or dependency approval.
Carry accepted advanced motion cues in designVectors and motionSystem as intent, and keep libraryPolicy authorization separate.
outputRequirements: Return a reusable design contract that can drive design.md, implementation-plan artifacts, and a Canvas-ready prototype path.
Keep the direction premium, specific, and implementable instead of generic or template-driven.
Keep libraryPolicy.motion and libraryPolicy.threeD empty in generated samples unless a separate runtime change explicitly approves those libraries.

formats.label: Premium editorial landing page
formats.lead: Study the inspiration references and synthesize a premium editorial landing page system that translates the source brief into a reusable, brand-specific direction.
formats.layoutArchetype: full-bleed hero with narrative section cadence
formats.typographySystem: display serif or refined grotesk headlines paired with restrained sans body copy
formats.surfaceTreatment: bright print-like planes, disciplined image crops, and hairline dividers
formats.shapeLanguage: sharp framing with selective soft corners only where interaction requires it
formats.componentGrammar: hero composition, proof bands, narrative media strips, restrained CTA groups
formats.motionGrammar: measured fades, staggered reveals, and restrained parallax
formats.paletteIntent: bright neutral field with one confident accent and controlled contrast
responsiveCollapseRules: Collapse split editorial compositions into a single text-first stack before line length becomes cramped.
Keep one dominant visual plane on mobile rather than shrinking multiple competing media blocks.
guardrails: Prioritize one dominant hero idea and a clear narrative progression instead of dashboard-style clutter.
Favor a full-bleed visual approach with restrained supporting copy and deliberate section sequencing.
antiPatterns: No metric strip in the first viewport.
No dashboard chrome on a marketing surface.
deliverables: Translate the references into a reusable design contract that fits the product story, audience, and brand voice in the source brief.
Define the hero doctrine, visual hierarchy, and section cadence clearly enough for a first implementation pass.

formats.label: B2B dashboard or app shell
formats.lead: Use the inspiration references and source brief to extract a reusable dashboard and app-shell contract that stays fast, calm, and operator-friendly.
formats.layoutArchetype: predictable desktop shell with fixed navigation zones and state-aware work panels
formats.typographySystem: sharp grotesk UI type with monospaced numeric support for tables and diagnostics
formats.surfaceTreatment: bright control-room surfaces with disciplined dividers and low-elevation panels
formats.shapeLanguage: rectilinear structure with restrained radii and explicit separators
formats.componentGrammar: sidebar, command toolbar, filter rail, data tables, detail drawers, empty states
formats.motionGrammar: state-transition clarity, panel continuity, and zero decorative animation noise
formats.paletteIntent: crisp neutral shell with one utility accent and clear semantic state colors
responsiveCollapseRules: Collapse secondary panes before compressing the primary work surface.
Preserve search, filters, and the primary action path as fixed zones on narrow breakpoints.
guardrails: Favor predictable layout zones, strong state communication, and clean action paths over decorative UI noise.
Keep the interaction model credible and scalable across desktop breakpoints.
antiPatterns: No hero marketing treatment inside the shell.
No ornamental glass or neon styling.
deliverables: Return a dashboard contract that can guide a first implementation plan and a Canvas-first prototype handoff.
Specify the shell grammar for navigation, filters, data views, and state feedback.

formats.label: Cinematic product-story or photostudio direction
formats.lead: Study the inspiration references and synthesize a cinematic product-story direction that turns the source brief into a premium, product-led narrative.
formats.layoutArchetype: scene-based scroll story with full-bleed product reveals
formats.typographySystem: restrained sans or condensed display with large scale contrast and minimal body copy
formats.surfaceTreatment: dark or bright studio backdrops, high-contrast product planes, and controlled material highlights
formats.shapeLanguage: large uninterrupted planes with almost no ornamental framing
formats.componentGrammar: scene hero, proof interludes, spec reveals, testimonial or quote punctuations
formats.motionGrammar: slow dissolves, glide transitions, and product-led reveal timing
formats.paletteIntent: controlled studio palette that serves material realism instead of interface variety
responsiveCollapseRules: Keep one scene per scroll beat on mobile instead of compressing multiple proof layers together.
Stack product proof and supporting copy under the main image plane once panoramic width is lost.
guardrails: Do not fall back to generic ecommerce grids, trust-badge clutter, or spec-dump layouts.
Prioritize product-story clarity over commerce-system conventions and keep the scene count disciplined.
antiPatterns: No dense comparison tables in the hero.
deliverables: Return a premium product-led story with 3 to 5 clear scene beats and a strong visual hierarchy.
Define the scene structure, motion posture, and proof handoff clearly enough for a launch-page build.

formats.label: Mobile-first onboarding and activation flow
formats.lead: Work from the inspiration references and source brief to define a mobile-first onboarding and activation experience that moves a user from curiosity to a confident first action.
formats.layoutArchetype: screen-sequenced onboarding stack with clear first-action transition
formats.typographySystem: high-legibility mobile sans with deliberate contrast between titles, helper copy, and CTA labels
formats.surfaceTreatment: native-feeling surfaces, clean overlays, and quiet previews of the core product
formats.shapeLanguage: soft, tap-friendly forms and decisive CTA containers
formats.componentGrammar: value slides, progress moments, CTA stacks, trust cues, first-session empty states
formats.motionGrammar: confident screen pacing, low-friction transitions, and gentle confirmation motion
formats.paletteIntent: safe, modern mobile palette with one brand accent and generous clean space
focusAreas: visual rules that should carry into the core product
responsiveCollapseRules: Treat mobile as the source layout and only expand supporting previews for larger breakpoints.
Keep primary CTAs anchored within thumb reach when the flow collapses to narrow screens.
guardrails: Keep the system simple, emotionally clear, and conversion-focused instead of overloaded with feature marketing.
Make the outcome feel native, modern, and brand-specific rather than template-driven.
antiPatterns: No marketing landing page hero inside onboarding.
No overloaded feature tour before first action.
No desktop-first shell adapted down to mobile.
deliverables: Return a reusable onboarding direction that can become both a contract and an implementation-ready prototype plan.
Define the launch tone, CTA posture, first-session empty-state behavior, and transition moments.

formats.label: Existing product redesign from inspiration
bestFor: quality upgrades without a full rebrand
businessFocus: mature brands needing a quality lift
formats.lead: Compare the source brief against the inspiration references and synthesize a redesign contract that upgrades the product without discarding its core identity.
formats.layoutArchetype: familiar shell with sharpened hierarchy and reduced ornament
formats.typographySystem: brand-safe type refresh that raises contrast without forcing a new visual language
formats.surfaceTreatment: existing brand DNA cleaned into brighter, calmer, more disciplined surfaces
formats.shapeLanguage: minimal shape shifts that improve confidence without looking like a rebrand
formats.componentGrammar: keep-versus-rebuild map across nav, hero, sections, cards, and forms
formats.motionGrammar: subtle polish motion that signals quality rather than novelty
formats.paletteIntent: stay inside brand memory while improving clarity, contrast, and discipline
responsiveCollapseRules: Preserve the core product shell while removing only the weakest supporting decoration on smaller breakpoints.
Collapse any new premium framing before harming the known action path or navigation model.
guardrails: Avoid superficial mimicry and avoid proposing a totally unrelated brand system.
Favor the smallest coherent visual shift that creates a real quality jump.
antiPatterns: No hard rebrand unless the brief explicitly asks for it.
No novelty components that disrupt known user flows.
No random style mixing from multiple references.
deliverables: Return a transformation plan that is specific enough to drive implementation-plan artifacts and clear enough to hand directly into Canvas.
Explain what to keep, remove, simplify, amplify, and restyle across the core surface.

formats.label: Maison campaign world
formats.lead: Study the inspiration references and synthesize a maison campaign system that feels expensive, editorial, and brand-sovereign rather than digitally generic.
formats.layoutArchetype: poster-scale editorial spread with chaptered campaign beats
formats.typographySystem: high-contrast serif display paired with a narrow polished grotesk support system
formats.surfaceTreatment: bright gallery whites, deep photographic contrast, and couture-grade negative space
formats.shapeLanguage: frame-led compositions, hairline dividers, and almost no utilitarian chrome
formats.componentGrammar: campaign hero, chapter markers, collection highlights, quote interludes, couture CTA moments
formats.motionGrammar: slow dissolves, image drifts, and precise text reveal pacing
formats.paletteIntent: light editorial base with ink-black contrast and one jewel-toned accent
responsiveCollapseRules: Keep one campaign image dominant on mobile rather than shrinking a spread into multiple tiles.
Move supporting chapter markers beneath the hero stack once the poster layout collapses.
guardrails: Keep the system poised, bright, and expensive rather than dark, loud, or overtly technical.
Treat interaction chrome as secondary to image-led composition and typographic authority.
deliverables: Define the hero doctrine, chapter sequence, typography scale, photography treatment, motion cues, and CTA posture.
Return a reusable campaign-world contract that can scale across launch, collection, and brand story surfaces.

formats.label: Sunlit resort narrative
formats.lead: Work from the references to create a resort narrative system that feels sunlit, breathable, and destination-led rather than like a booking engine template.
formats.layoutArchetype: panoramic media planes with story-to-booking progression
formats.typographySystem: refined sans with lightly romantic display moments and generous line length
formats.surfaceTreatment: warm mineral surfaces, luminous image planes, and quiet itinerary bands
formats.shapeLanguage: soft-edged frames, map ribbons, and understated sectional dividers
formats.componentGrammar: panorama hero, itinerary strips, amenity chapters, map moments, booking CTA band
formats.motionGrammar: soft parallax, crossfades, and calm scroll pacing
formats.paletteIntent: sunlit mineral neutrals with ocean or stone accents
responsiveCollapseRules: Collapse panoramas into one priority image followed by itinerary and booking content.
Move any map or amenity ribbons below the first booking CTA on narrow screens.
guardrails: Keep the composition spacious, bright, and calm rather than dense or transactional in the first viewport.
Use reservation moments as a payoff to the story, not as the dominant hero payload.
antiPatterns: No booking-engine clutter above the fold.
deliverables: Define the story-to-booking sequence, gallery rules, map module grammar, booking CTA cadence, and responsive image behavior.
Return a reusable hospitality narrative contract that can support both destination storytelling and conversion.

formats.label: Architecture monograph system
formats.lead: Study the references and define an architecture monograph system that feels rigorous, silent, and materially precise rather than market-driven.
formats.layoutArchetype: baseline-driven case-study grid with full-bleed drawing and photography pairings
formats.typographySystem: elegant serif narrative text with mono or narrow sans captioning for plans, sections, and annotations
formats.surfaceTreatment: paper-bright backgrounds, disciplined black rules, and full-bleed documentation plates
formats.shapeLanguage: hard-edged framing, asymmetrical margins, and gallery-like restraint
formats.componentGrammar: project index, drawing plate, material notes, caption rails, silent CTA treatments
formats.motionGrammar: almost-silent motion, precise image crossfades, and subtle chapter shifts
formats.paletteIntent: architectural neutrals with stone, graphite, and one material accent
responsiveCollapseRules: Stack drawings and photography vertically before shrinking annotation legibility.
Keep captions attached to their artifacts on mobile instead of floating them into side rails.
guardrails: Keep the system rigorous, restrained, and material-first rather than promotional.
Let drawings, plans, and photography carry authority instead of decorative interface chrome.
deliverables: Define the archive index, case-study template, caption rules, image rhythm, and spacing discipline.
Return a monograph-grade contract that can guide both portfolio and project-depth surfaces.

formats.label: Luminous insight landing page
formats.lead: Study the inspiration references and synthesize a luminous insight landing page that turns research-backed ideas into a premium, text-light public story.
formats.layoutArchetype: full-bleed insight story with visual proof bands
formats.typographySystem: precise sans for data and narrative paired with restrained serif emphasis
formats.surfaceTreatment: ivory research planes, layered evidence visuals, and generous image-led whitespace
formats.shapeLanguage: clean modules, visual proof frames, and quiet emphasis bands
formats.componentGrammar: hero composition, insight proof bands, visual story panels, outcome moments, restrained CTA groups
formats.motionGrammar: calm reveal transitions, proof-panel emphasis, and restrained visual depth
formats.paletteIntent: bright ivory base with measured accent coding for evidence groups
responsiveCollapseRules: Collapse visual proof bands into a single readable story stack before reducing chart legibility.
Keep evidence labels visually close to the relevant section without turning mobile into an appendix.
guardrails: Keep the surface bright, exact, and evidence-led without becoming a documentation hub.
Use motion to clarify priority, proof, and action rather than to explain long-form methodology.
deliverables: Define the evidence hierarchy, visual proof rhythm, insight story cadence, and conversion path.
Return a premium insight landing contract detailed enough for a visually led Canvas-ready implementation.

formats.label: Private wealth salon
formats.lead: Work from the references to synthesize a private wealth system that feels like a discreet salon rather than a retail fintech dashboard.
formats.layoutArchetype: split-panel trust sequence with couture data previews and service-led sections
formats.typographySystem: tall high-contrast headlines with polished sans detail and refined numeric styling
formats.surfaceTreatment: warm neutral surfaces, quiet paper textures, and disciplined premium separators
formats.shapeLanguage: framed content rooms, quiet tab rails, and couture table spacing
formats.componentGrammar: trust hero, portfolio preview, advisor modules, secure access moments, service panels
formats.motionGrammar: restrained hover microphysics and dignified panel continuity
formats.paletteIntent: warm neutrals, muted metallic accents, and calm signal colors
responsiveCollapseRules: Collapse split salons into a single guided trust sequence before compressing numeric previews.
Keep the secure action path and advisor contact moment visible without crowding the first viewport.
guardrails: Keep the system discreet, bright, and high-confidence instead of aggressive or hype-driven.
Treat data previews as crafted typography and spacing problems, not as loud KPI tiles.
antiPatterns: No neon or dark-trading UI posture.
deliverables: Define the trust architecture, data-preview modules, advisor touchpoints, secure entry tone, and motion restraint rules.
Return a reusable private-wealth contract that can guide both marketing and authenticated advisory surfaces.

formats.label: Cultural festival atlas
formats.lead: Study the references and define a cultural festival atlas that feels poster-led, kinetic, and editorial rather than like a corporate event microsite.
formats.layoutArchetype: chaptered program sequence with wayfinding color blocks and event-driven typographic beats
formats.typographySystem: expressive variable type paired with a sober schedule support face
formats.surfaceTreatment: bright poster fields, color-block navigation, and layered program markers
formats.shapeLanguage: poster frames, directional bars, stacked ribbons, and event tags
formats.componentGrammar: edition hero, lineup atlas, schedule chapters, venue maps, ticket pathways
formats.motionGrammar: kinetic type bands, chapter transitions, and route-aware section motion
formats.paletteIntent: bright thematic palette system with venue or category coding
responsiveCollapseRules: Reduce poster-grid complexity to a clean event list plus prominent schedule filters on mobile.
Keep venue maps and ticket actions in the same narrative lane once space becomes limited.
guardrails: Keep the direction cultural, expressive, and controlled rather than generic corporate-conference UI.
Let typography and wayfinding structure create the energy before adding decorative media.
deliverables: Define the identity system, schedule grammar, venue map modules, ticket CTA logic, and motion choreography.
Return a reusable festival contract that can cover edition landing, lineup, program, and pass-conversion surfaces.

formats.label: Wellness ritual system
formats.lead: Study the references and synthesize a wellness ritual system that feels luminous, calm, and premium without collapsing into stock spa cliches.
formats.layoutArchetype: porcelain chapter flow with ritual steps, proof surfaces, and booking or activation moments
formats.typographySystem: soft modern serif accents over highly legible sans narrative copy
formats.surfaceTreatment: porcelain surfaces, mineral gradients, translucent layers, and macro texture photography
formats.shapeLanguage: gentle curves, rounded panels, and flowing sectional transitions
formats.componentGrammar: ritual hero, routine modules, ingredient proof surfaces, booking moments, calm testimonials
formats.motionGrammar: breathing rhythm, gentle float motion, and calm confirmation transitions
formats.paletteIntent: bright mineral palette with skin-safe neutrals and one clean accent
responsiveCollapseRules: Stack ritual steps vertically before shrinking proof imagery or ingredient legibility.
Keep booking or activation moments separated from storytelling content on narrow screens.
guardrails: Keep the system bright, thematic, and premium rather than washed-out, decorative, or medicalized.
Use motion to reinforce calm confidence, not to create soft-focus vagueness.
deliverables: Define the ritual flow modules, ingredient and proof surfaces, booking moments, first-session tone, and motion breathing rules.
Return a reusable wellness contract for product, clinic, and app activation surfaces.

formats.label: Creative tool laboratory
formats.lead: Use the references to create a creative tool laboratory direction that feels precise, bright, and premium without falling back to generic admin shells.
formats.layoutArchetype: bright laboratory shell with stage, inspector, and specimen panels
formats.typographySystem: sharp grotesk UI type with monospaced support for tokens, coordinates, and diagnostics
formats.surfaceTreatment: lab-white shell, modular trays, and layered canvas previews
formats.shapeLanguage: modular docks, specimen cards, inspector rails, and crisp separators
formats.componentGrammar: stage shell, inspector, prompt panels, specimen modules, stateful controls
formats.motionGrammar: state continuity, transform-led panel transitions, and specimen emphasis motion
formats.paletteIntent: bright lab whites with one vivid tool accent and disciplined neutral scaffolding
responsiveCollapseRules: Collapse the inspector after the stage and primary controls are stable on smaller breakpoints.
Keep prompt input and primary creation actions in a fixed vertical lane on narrow screens.
guardrails: Keep the workspace premium and bright, not dark-gamer or gadget-heavy.
Make motion serve state continuity and tool confidence, not generic micro-animation noise.
antiPatterns: No decorative empty-state illustration that hides the tool's real structure.
deliverables: Define the shell grammar, sidebar and inspector rules, stage hierarchy, specimen component set, and transition map.
Return a reusable creative-tool contract that can drive both the marketing frame and the actual product shell.

formats.label: Precision mobility flagship
formats.lead: Study the references and define a precision mobility flagship that feels engineered, aerodynamic, and premium without becoming a spec dump or dealer template.
formats.layoutArchetype: panoramic launch composition with sectional proof reveals and cockpit framing
formats.typographySystem: condensed display typography with technical mono or narrow sans support
formats.surfaceTreatment: bright or graphite technical planes, cutaway diagrams, and controlled highlight lines
formats.shapeLanguage: aerodynamic bands, sectional overlays, and instrument-inspired detail modules
formats.componentGrammar: flagship hero, technical proof rail, sectional cutaways, performance figures, CTA close
formats.motionGrammar: glide motion, instrument-style reveals, and controlled engineering emphasis
formats.paletteIntent: precision neutrals with one performance accent and disciplined contrast
responsiveCollapseRules: Turn sectional cutaways into stacked proof chapters before sacrificing diagram clarity.
Keep the primary performance and CTA story lane intact on mobile rather than distributing it across tabs or accordions.
guardrails: Keep the system premium, exact, and flagship-oriented rather than automotive commerce or gadget marketing.
Let engineering proof emerge in sequence instead of dumping all specifications at once.
antiPatterns: No cluttered comparison tables above the fold.
deliverables: Define the launch storyboard, technical proof modules, performance-data styling, CTA sequence, and motion timing.
Return a reusable flagship contract for mobility, robotics, and engineering-led hardware launches.

formats.label: Members club concierge
formats.lead: Use the references to synthesize a members-club concierge system that feels stately, selective, and service-led rather than like a benefits comparison page.
formats.layoutArchetype: invitation-led room sequence with framed service modules and access moments
formats.typographySystem: stately serif headlines with polished sans navigation and membership detail copy
formats.surfaceTreatment: bright club rooms, invitation cards, schedule ribbons, and warm premium materials
formats.shapeLanguage: framed rooms, invitation panels, ribbon markers, and curated content compartments
formats.componentGrammar: invitation hero, tier narrative, concierge request modules, schedule ribbons, social proof rooms
formats.motionGrammar: subtle reveal, magnetic hover restraint, and service-led transition pacing
formats.paletteIntent: bright cream or stone base with restrained metallic and club-accent notes
responsiveCollapseRules: Collapse framed rooms into a guided membership sequence before compressing the access narrative.
Keep the invitation and concierge request moment within the same mobile lane.
guardrails: Keep the direction stately, bright, and selective rather than flashy or social-feed oriented.
Use privilege and service cues with discipline so the surface still feels curated and elegant.
deliverables: Define the access narrative, membership architecture, concierge request surfaces, proof format, and spacing plus motion contract.
Return a reusable members-club contract for private access, service, and executive-network surfaces.
